targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('$service_id' = 'All' OR service_id = '$service_id')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND user_id IS NOT NULL AND ('$service_id' = 'All' OR service_id = '$service_id')
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND event_type = 'page_view' AND ('$service_id' = 'All' OR service_id = '$service_id')

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cnt > 1 THEN user_id END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 0), 1), 0) AS value FROM (SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND event_type = 'page_view' AND user_id IS NOT NULL AND ('$service_id' = 'All' OR service_id = '$service_id') GROUP BY user_id) t
SELECT service_id as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY service_id ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'lotto-oracle' AND event_type = 'page_view'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'seobi-chat' AND event_type = 'page_view'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'profile' AND event_type = 'page_view'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'boldgobynd' AND event_type = 'page_view'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'page_view'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'my-ui-lib' AND event_type = 'page_view'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'kis-trader' AND event_type = 'pageview'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'kis-trader' AND user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'lotto-oracle' AND user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'seobi-chat' AND user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'profile' AND user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'boldgobynd' AND user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'my-ui-lib' AND user_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, service_id || ' / ' || event_type AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('$service_id' = 'All' OR service_id = '$service_id') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT service_id, event_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('$service_id' = 'All' OR service_id = '$service_id') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT service_id, metadata->>'referrer' as referrer, COUNT(*) as visits FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND event_type = 'page_view' AND metadata->>'referrer' IS NOT NULL AND ('$service_id' = 'All' OR service_id = '$service_id') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('$service_id' = 'All' OR service_id = '$service_id') GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT service_id, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY service_id ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'seobi-chat' AND event_type = 'voice_input'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'seobi-chat' AND event_type = 'no_speech'

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN event_type = 'voice_input' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN event_type IN ('voice_input', 'no_speech') THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'seobi-chat'

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, event_type AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'seobi-chat' AND event_type IN ('voice_input', 'no_speech') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'kis-trader' AND event_type = 'pageview'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'kis-trader' AND event_type = 'login'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'kis-trader' AND event_type = 'backtest_run'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'kis-trader' AND event_type = 'simulation_activate'
SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, event_type AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'kis-trader' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_events WHERE service_id = 'techfeed' AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, event_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM user_events WHERE service_id = 'techfeed' AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_events WHERE service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'app_open' AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_events WHERE service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'review' AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_events WHERE service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'login' AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_events WHERE service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'signup' AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT CASE WHEN user_id IS NULL THEN '비로그인' ELSE '로그인' END AS user_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_events WHERE service_id = 'techfeed' AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, event_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM user_events WHERE service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type IN ('click', 'bookmark', 'share', 'like', 'search') AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'read'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'click'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'bookmark'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'share'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'like'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'search'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'filter_apply'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'tab_visit'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'push_enable'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'push_disable'
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM user_events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND service_id = 'techfeed' AND event_type = 'login_prompt_seen'
